steps: Ligate the U6x:sgRNA cassettes into a pGGDestTol2LC vector by mixing the following components: pGGDestTol2LC-sgRNA ligation mixture by Tracey Depellegrin
The reaction is ready for transformation (use 5 µl of the ligation and plate 50% of the transformants). Transform and spread onto ampicillin (100 µg/ml) plates.
creator: Tracey Depellegrin
